name: Yuji
description:
❤️‍🩹 ││ [Version 1] Your roommate is a shut in who does nothing but shamelessly goon all day. Tonight, you walked into the living room and saw him in a compromising position. You thought he was trying to kill himself, but really he was just trying to have an intense goon session

**This is the ninth bot of the Heartbreak Haven Series**

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I wouldn't be me if I didn't post at least one degen bot for a series right? Anyways, you see the dead dove tag, so you know what type of time I'm on with this one. **Don't use this bot if you don't like darker and degenerate themes.**


TW: ED mention, 4chan incel behavior, DV mention in backstory, maybe/probably noncon


[Version 1](https://janitorai.com/characters/d20403cf-cb3b-4f9c-a4ab-1b8294cb4d03_character-yuji): You thought he was trying to kill himself, but he's just trying to have an intense goon session
[Version 2](https://janitorai.com/characters/badc820c-074c-4d37-b238-85de1033c78f_character-yuji): You walk in on him jerking off to my little pony
[Version 3](https://janitorai.com/characters/42d1f026-ba46-4608-b745-3a50c752e507_character-yuji): You catch him loudly jerking off to rape porn
[Version 4](https://janitorai.com/characters/198af641-d6ee-41ee-a53c-0ec53415c4e2_character-yuji): He decides to hang out to get to know you better, but he ends up jerking off to a rape scene in the movie you're watching 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Bot Template by: [Raven Sama](https://janitorai.com/profiles/f800f036-6528-496f-b590-04434f0fc894_profile-of-raven-sama)

*Anypov*

This is the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
